overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character with green facial implants closing a Trauma Team container and exploring a cluttered industrial warehouse interior. The scene transitions from a dimly lit storage area with biohazard materials through a narrow corridor into a large open industrial hall with natural light streaming through windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered storage area with medical waste container

events.description: character closes the lid of the green Trauma Team container
camera begins moving away from the container

agents.ego_description: closing the container lid and then turning to walk away from the container

entered.detail: large green container with TRAUMA TEAM text and red medical symbol containing a body
metal shelving units with various items and equipment

segments.scene_description: The player character stands before a green Trauma Team container in a dimly lit industrial corner. After closing the container lid, the character turns and begins walking away, revealing cluttered shelving and barrels in the surrounding storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage area with biohazard materials

events.description: passing by burning barrel with open flame providing warm light
moving past warm fire light into slightly dimmer area with blood stains visible

agents.ego_description: walking through cluttered industrial space past biohazard barrels and caution signs

entered.detail: large pink barrels with yellow biohazard warning labels
yellow wet floor caution sign with black triangle
barrel with open flames providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the container, the camera navigates through a cluttered industrial back area. Large biohazard barrels stand to the right near a caution sign, while a burning barrel casts flickering orange light across the concrete floor. Blood stains and debris litter the ground as the player progresses deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with vending machines

events.description: entering darker corridor section with metal shelving and corrugated walls
approaching bright window light at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridor past vending machines and storage shelves toward the light

entered.detail: tall metal shelving with red indicator lights and various supplies
purple and blue vending machine with illuminated display screen
glass cabinet with cylindrical containers inside

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a dimly lit narrow corridor lined with corrugated metal walls. To the right, a vending machine and glass display cabinet stand beside metal shelving units. The corridor leads toward bright natural light streaming through windows at the far end, creating a stark contrast with the dark interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: large industrial warehouse hall with overhead windows

events.description: emerging from narrow corridor into large open industrial hall with high ceilings
slowing down as approaching character working at metal workbench

agents.ego_description: walking into the large industrial space and approaching a character working at a station

notable_agents.action: character working at a metal workbench or industrial station

entered.detail: large windows letting in bright natural sunlight
long fluorescent light fixtures hanging from ceiling
industrial workbench with equipment and tools
visible ventilation ducts and pipes on high ceiling

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into a vast industrial warehouse hall with high ceilings and exposed ductwork. Bright natural light streams through large windows on the right, illuminating dust particles in the air. Overhead fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling. At the far end, a character works at a metal workbench, and the player approaches while taking in the expansive industrial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dimly lit, hazardous storage corner into a vast, light-filled industrial warehouse. It begins with the player closing a green Trauma Team container and turning away to navigate a cluttered back area filled with shelving and barrels. As the camera progresses, the environment grows grittier, passing by biohazard barrels and a burning drum that casts flickering orange light over blood-stained concrete. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor of corrugated metal and vending machines, moving steadily toward a glow of natural light at the far end. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into an expansive hall with high ceilings and exposed ductwork, where bright sunlight illuminates floating dust particles as the player approaches a character at a distant workbench.
